title: Technetium
body:
![A red banner with a white trefoil (radiation symbol) and the words "technetium" beside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a32b509a2b8aa0dd2effc0f31393c147fd980e.png)

## A lightweight modpack built on Fabric with an ensemble of vanilla plus mods.

Technetium is a lightweight Vanilla Plus modpack designed to keep Minecraft feeling familiar while boosting performance, visuals, and quality-of-life. Perfect for players who want an Optimised base for their own modpack. 

![Tiga Village at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60624ba88646db7c00199dd01a2c477940b8fc12.jpeg)

With Photon Shaders
